title: bidens lineariloba
intro: Bidens lineariloba, also known as Heartleaf or Linear-leaved Beggarticks, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Bidens lineariloba include reducing fever and alleviating rheumatic pain, as well as promoting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Bidens lineariloba include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
